title: Power intelligent agents with AI-native databases
summary: AI-native databases are presented as essential infrastructure for powering agents with enterprise data, enabling contextual relevance and operational automation. The session advocates for graph retrieval-augmented generation, natural language interfaces, and open standards like Model Context Protocol to deliver high-fidelity context to agents.
writeup: This Google Cloud Tech session frames AI-native databases as core infrastructure for connecting agents to enterprise data, with the goal of delivering contextual relevance and operational automation. It matters because agents need high-fidelity context to act reliably on business data. The concrete takeaways: graph retrieval-augmented generation for richer retrieval, natural language interfaces for querying, and open standards including Model Context Protocol for supplying context to agents.
